tema: Comparatives & Superlatives — The Great Dilemmas of Life

vocabulario.palabra: delicious · more delicious · the most delicious
entertaining · more entertaining · the most entertaining
fun · more fun · the most fun
relaxing · more relaxing · the most relaxing
interesting · more interesting · the most interesting

banco_oraciones.oracion: Pizza is more delicious than a burger — that's science.
Homemade food is healthier than fast food.
YouTube is as entertaining as Netflix.
Ice cream is the best dessert in the world.
Shopping is less relaxing than sleeping.
A burger isn't as delicious as pizza.
Fast food isn't healthier than homemade food.
Texting isn't better than calling; it's just easier.
Winter isn't the worst season — Monday is the worst 'season'.
Which is more entertaining: YouTube or Netflix?
Is dancing as fun as singing karaoke?
What is the most delicious food in your country?
Is pizza better than a burger? Yes, it is.
Is fast food as healthy as homemade food? No, it isn't.
Are cats easier than dogs? Yes, they are.

interaccion: Kenji: Serious question: is YouTube **more entertaining than** Netflix?
Ben: YouTube! It's **cheaper**... well, it's free. But pizza vs burger is **the most difficult** dilemma.
Sofía: Easy — pizza is **more delicious than** a burger, and homemade pizza is **the best** of all.
Abuela Carmen: You are all wrong. Sleeping is **better than** shopping, YouTube and pizza... together!

banner_diagnostico.opcion_a: Pizza is more better than a burger.
banner_diagnostico.opcion_b: Pizza is better than a burger.

inicio.definicion_pragmatica: Comparatives and superlatives let you settle real-life dilemmas — saying which of two things is better, worse or equal, and which one is the champion of all.

filas: Pizza is more delicious than a burger
Chocolate is less refreshing than ice cream
Tea is as healthy as coffee
Sleeping is the most relaxing plan of all
Monday is the least fun day of the week
big → bigger · easy → easier · good → better · bad → worse
the biggest, the easiest, the best, the worst

ejercicios.pregunta: Monday is ___ fun day of the week.

ejercicios.afirmacion: 'Good' and 'bad' are irregular: better / the best, worse / the worst.

ejercicios.texto: Homemade food is ___ (healthy) than fast food.
Ice cream is ___ (good) than chocolate. Discuss!
That was ___ (bad) movie of the year.

ejercicios.respuesta: Is shopping as fun as sleeping
YouTube is more entertaining than Netflix

ejercicios.texto_con_error: Pizza is more better than a burger.
ejercicios.respuesta: Pizza is better than a burger.

ejercicios.texto_con_error: This is the most easy exercise.
A burger is deliciouser than a hot dog.
ejercicios.respuesta: A burger is more delicious than a hot dog.

ejercicios.oracion_base: Fast food is cheaper than homemade food.
ejercicios.respuesta: Fast food isn't cheaper than homemade food.

ejercicios.oracion_base: Dancing is as fun as karaoke.
ejercicios.respuesta: Is dancing as fun as karaoke?
Cats are more difficult than dogs.

ejercicios.pregunta: Is pizza more delicious than a burger? (short answer)
Is fast food as healthy as homemade food? (short answer, No)

guion: Kenji: OK, final question: ice cream or chocolate?
Sofía: Ice cream is more refreshing than chocolate, but chocolate is the most romantic gift.
Ben: For me, ice cream is the best dessert in the world. Chocolate is less exciting.
Kenji: Interesting... and tea or coffee?
Abuela Carmen: In this house, coffee is the king. Tea is as healthy as coffee, but it isn't as delicious!

comprension.pregunta: What does Ben think is the best dessert in the world?
Does Abuela Carmen think tea is as delicious as coffee?

reading.texto: Kenji writes a blog about his life in Colombia. This week's post: 'The Great Dilemmas of Life'. After three months of serious research, here are my results. Pizza vs burger: pizza is more delicious, but a burger is easier to eat on the bus. YouTube vs Netflix: YouTube is cheaper (it's free!), but Netflix is better for movie nights. Fast food vs homemade food: fast food is faster, obviously, but Abuela Carmen's beans are the most delicious food in Colombia — maybe in the world. Shopping vs sleeping: sleeping is less expensive and more relaxing. Final conclusion: the best things in life are free... like sleeping and YouTube.

preguntas.afirmacion: Kenji thinks pizza is more delicious than a burger.
Kenji thinks Abuela Carmen's beans are the most delicious food in Colombia.
According to Kenji, shopping is more relaxing than sleeping.
